Troubleshooting

Authentication Issues

Section titled “Authentication Issues”

”Invalid API key”

Section titled “”Invalid API key””

Cause: API key is incorrect, expired, or not set

Solution:

“UNAUTHENTICATED” Error

Section titled ““UNAUTHENTICATED” Error”

Cause: Missing or invalid authentication token

Solution:

Deployment Issues

Section titled “Deployment Issues”

Endpoint Creation Fails

Section titled “Endpoint Creation Fails”

Error: “Image not found in registry”

Solution:

Error: “Resource quota exceeded”

Solution:

  • Check current usage: nebius quota show
  • Request quota increase in Nebius Console
  • Delete unused resources

Kubernetes Issues

Section titled “Kubernetes Issues”

Pod not starting

Persistent volume issues

Networking Issues

Section titled “Networking Issues”

Cannot Connect to Endpoint

Section titled “Cannot Connect to Endpoint”

Solution:

DNS Resolution Fails

Section titled “DNS Resolution Fails”

Solution:

Performance Issues

Section titled “Performance Issues”

High Latency

Section titled “High Latency”

Check:

  • Model size and inference time
  • Network latency to endpoint
  • Instance type capabilities
  • Concurrent request load

Solution:

Out of Memory

Section titled “Out of Memory”

Error: “OOM Killer”

Solution:

Monitoring & Debugging

Section titled “Monitoring & Debugging”

Check Endpoint Logs

Section titled “Check Endpoint Logs”

View Metrics

Section titled “View Metrics”

Debugging Kubernetes

Section titled “Debugging Kubernetes”

Cost Issues

Section titled “Cost Issues”

Unexpected High Bills

Section titled “Unexpected High Bills”

Check:

  1. Unused resources running (stop/delete them)
  2. Large data transfers out of region
  3. Spot instance interruptions (increased costs)
  4. Storage growth

Solution:

Getting Help

Section titled “Getting Help”
  • Check Nebius Documentation
  • Search GitHub Issues
  • Join Nebius Community
  • Contact Support
